Contact.Notes: Family anchor. Lives at the family home in southwest Atlanta with day-to-day coordination through Aunt Keisha. Sunday 2:00 PM call is the standing check-in. Phone only, she rarely texts.
Main family point of contact. Hassan reports to her on academic progress and financial aid status. She supports Hassan's nursing path.
Nursing assistant at Greenleaf Health. Blunt, practical, Hassan's unofficial nursing mentor. Regular communication.

Lives near Grandma Mabel and handles her day-to-day care. Hassan sends her a monthly transfer for shared care costs; care ledger is coordinated with her directly. Transfers documented Sep 2025 through Feb 2026.
Primary academic advisor. Biweekly advising slot on the calendar. Advises on course sequence, GPA recovery plan, and nursing program application timeline.
Instructor for NURS 2300 and BIOL 2120. Key faculty contact for nursing program recommendation. Office hours Tuesdays. Attend before Oct 7 pharmacology midterm.
Instructor for NURS 2250 Health Assessment. Practical exam Nov 13 2026. Check office hours schedule.
Instructor for MATH 2050 Statistics for the Health Sciences, Fall 2026.
Direct supervisor at campus dining hall. Oversees Hassan's serving line, dish, and brunch shifts. Approves time sheets. 12 hours per week schedule: Tue/Thu evenings, Sat mornings.
Hassan's roommate and campus peer. First point of contact if unable to reach Hassan by phone in campus situation.

Verifies community service hours. Hassan accumulated 12 verified hours as of Feb 2026 toward 40-hour annual goal. Cert# HEP-2025-0418 issued Nov 8 2025. Contact for spring 2027 recommendation letter request.
Campus health services for enrollment forms and student health insurance waiver. Not an emergency contact.
Hassan's primary checking account. Receives dining hall direct deposit. Monthly transfer to Aunt Keisha is sent from this account. MARTA reloads and grocery transactions appear in Jan 2026 statement.
Aid renewal deadline October 15 2026. FAFSA re-submission required. Award letter issued Aug 2025 for current year. Contact using school email for all official correspondence.
